children.name: From aluminium window installers in the 1976s to India’s premier facade specialists, Alfa Facade Systems delivers world-class ACP cladding, structural glazing, and architectural solutions.
children.characters:
From aluminium window installers in the 1976s to India’s premier facade specialists, Alfa Facade
Systems delivers world-class ACP cladding, structural glazing, and architectural solutions.

children.name: To redefine architectural excellence through innovative facade solutions, delivering sustainable, aesthetically superior, and structurally sound building envelopes that stand the test of time.
children.characters:
To redefine architectural excellence through innovative
facade solutions, delivering sustainable, aesthetically
superior, and structurally sound building envelopes that
stand the test of time.

children.name: The facade industry is evolving rapidly—from energy-efficient glazing systems to fire-safe cladding regulations and sustainable materials. At Alfa Facade Systems, we don’t just adapt to change; we lead it. With four decades of hands-on experience across residential towers, commercial IT parks, healthcare institutions, and industrial facilities, we transform architectural visions into tangible landmarks.
children.characters:
The facade industry is evolving rapidly—from energy-efficient glazing systems
to fire-safe cladding regulations and sustainable materials. At Alfa Facade
Systems, we don’t just adapt to change; we lead it. With four decades of
hands-on experience across residential towers, commercial IT parks,
healthcare institutions, and industrial facilities, we transform architectural
visions into tangible landmarks.

children.name: From concept to completion, Alfa Facade Systems offers end-to-end building envelope solutions. Whether you’re constructing a new landmark or revitalizing an aging structure, our seven specialized service divisions deliver precision engineering and aesthetic perfection. Every facade challenge has a solution—and we’ve likely solved it before.
children.characters:
From concept to completion, Alfa Facade Systems offers end-to-end building envelope solutions. Whether you’re constructing a new
landmark or revitalizing an aging structure, our seven specialized service divisions deliver precision engineering and aesthetic perfection. Every
facade challenge has a solution—and we’ve likely solved it before.

children.name: Combine safety with transparency using Alfa Facade Systems' premium glass and steel railings.
children.characters:

children.name: Our proven 4-step framework ensures every facade project meets the highest standards of safety, aesthetics, and structural integrity.
children.characters:
Our proven 4-step framework ensures every facade project meets the highest
standards of safety, aesthetics, and structural integrity.

children.name: We begin every project with a comprehensive site visit and stakeholder consultation. Our technical team evaluates structural conditions, wind load requirements, aesthetic goals, and budget parameters. This collaborative discovery phase ensures our proposals are tailored precisely to your building’s unique needs and your project’s timeline.
children.characters:
We begin every project with a comprehensive site visit and
stakeholder consultation. Our technical team evaluates
structural conditions, wind load requirements, aesthetic goals,
and budget parameters. This collaborative discovery phase
ensures our proposals are tailored precisely to your building’s
unique needs and your project’s timeline.

children.name: Ready to start your project with a proven process?
children.characters: Ready to start your project with a proven process?

children.name: At Alfa Facade Systems, sustainability isn’t an afterthought—it’s integral to how we engineer, source, and install. We’re committed to reducing environmental impact while delivering facades that improve building energy efficiency and occupant comfort.
children.characters:
At Alfa Facade Systems, sustainability isn’t an
afterthought—it’s integral to how we engineer,
source, and install. We’re committed to reducing
environmental impact while delivering facades
that improve building energy efficiency and
occupant comfort.

children.name: Through precision digital fabrication, we minimize material waste at source. Our sites follow strict waste segregation protocols, and offcuts are collected for recycling rather than disposal. We use water-based, low-VOC sealants and coatings to protect indoor air quality and reduce environmental harm during installation.
children.characters:
Through precision digital fabrication, we minimize material waste at
source. Our sites follow strict waste segregation protocols, and offcuts
are collected for recycling rather than disposal. We use water-based,
low-VOC sealants and coatings to protect indoor air quality and
reduce environmental harm during installation.

children.name: For over 40 years, Alfa Facade Systems has been shaped by visionary leadership and a passionate commitment to architectural excellence. Under the guidance of our founder Mr. Zoher Chiniwala, we've grown from a small aluminum workshop into one of India's most trusted names in facade engineering. Our leadership team combines decades of technical expertise with forward-thinking innovation, ensuring every project benefits from strategic insight and operational excellence.
children.characters:
For over 40 years, Alfa Facade Systems has been shaped by visionary
leadership and a passionate commitment to architectural excellence. Under
the guidance of our founder Mr. Zoher Chiniwala, we've grown from a small
aluminum workshop into one of India's most trusted names in facade
engineering. Our leadership team combines decades of technical expertise
with forward-thinking innovation, ensuring every project benefits from
strategic insight and operational excellence.
